home.selectBabyForActivities: Select a baby to see activities
home.addChildSubtitle: Enter your child details to start tracking activities.
home.onlyOwnerCanDelete: Only the baby owner can delete it.
home.deleteBabyConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? All activities and data for this baby will be removed.

memories.title: Memories

help.title: How to use Bebiron
help.intro: Bebiron helps you track feedings, sleep and diapers, share a baby with your partner, and save memories. Here is a short step-by-step guide.

addBaby.title: Add your first child
addBaby.body: After sign-up, on Home enter name, birth date and time. That creates your first baby and opens the main screen with tabs.

activities.title: Log activities
activities.body: On Home tap Food, Sleep or Diapers, fill in the form and save. Today's overview and the list below show all entries for the selected baby.

switchBaby.title: Switch or add a baby
switchBaby.body: Tap the baby name at the top of Home → 'Select baby'. Pick another baby, add a new one (up to 3 you create), or edit details with the pencil icon.

shareBaby.title: Share access (you are the owner)
shareBaby.body: In 'Select baby', on your baby tap the link icon. The other parent gets a QR code and text code — send either one to them.

joinBaby.title: Join a baby (second parent)
joinBaby.body: Go to Settings → Join a baby, enter the code or scan QR. After a successful connection the baby appears on your Home with a shared access label.

reminders.title: Feeding reminder
reminders.body: In Settings turn on 'Reminder after feeding' and set minutes (e.g. 180). Each new feeding log automatically schedules the next reminder.

gallery.title: Memory gallery
gallery.body: Memories tab: add a photo for each month (1–12). Select a baby first if you have more than one.

help.tipGallery: You can save a gallery photo to your device with the download action.
help.tipMaxBabies: You can create up to {max} babies on your account; use a join code for more children.
help.tipCodeExpiry: Connection codes expire after 7 days — generate a new one from the share menu.

settings.title: Settings
settings.reminderDesc: Reminder fires after feeding (1–1440 min). A new log replaces the previous reminder.
settings.reminderSaved: Reminder will fire {minutes} minutes after the last feeding.
settings.joinBabySubtitle: Enter a code or scan a QR from another parent
settings.familyHint: You can create up to {max} babies ({count}/{max}). Share access from 'Select baby'.
settings.deleteAccountMessage: This action is permanent and cannot be undone. All your babies, activities, gallery photos and settings will be deleted. Are you sure?
settings.accountDeletedMessage: Your account and all data have been permanently removed.
settings.notificationsUnsupported: Reminders are not available in this browser.
settings.notificationPermissionMessage: Enable notifications in browser settings to receive reminders.
settings.joinBabyDesc: Enter a code from another parent.
settings.joinedBaby: Connected to the baby. You will see it on the home screen.
settings.cameraPermission: Allow camera access to scan QR code.
settings.shareForBaby: Another parent enters a code or scans QR for baby {name}.
settings.shareCodeHint: Code valid for 7 days. Settings → Join a baby.
settings.installAppHint: Add to home screen for a native-like experience.

notifications.unsupportedDevice: Reminders are not available in this browser.
notifications.unsupportedWeb: Reminders are not available on web.
notifications.reminderBody: Time for the next feeding for {name}!

seo.title: Bebiron — Track every little moment
seo.description: Bebiron is a gentle parenting app that tracks feedings, sleep, diapers and saves memories of the first 12 months.
seo.keywords: baby, baby tracker, feeding, sleep, diapers, reminder, gallery
